name: intervals-icu-jan
description: intervals.icu MCP server — 136 tools across 17 domains. Lean profile (default) exposes 45 high-value tools (~14.9k tokens); flip the full_toolset toggle for the full surface (~44k tokens). Strava-sourced activities render a clean [strava-restricted] advisory (intervals.icu can't serve Strava data via its API). Forked from mvilanova/intervals-mcp-server.
long_description:
Model Context Protocol server exposing the intervals.icu REST API for personal use. Covers activities (CRUD, analytics, search), events (calendar CRUD + bulk ops), wellness (read + locked-aware writes), workout templates, sport settings, gear + reminders, athlete profile + training plan, weather, routes, file operations (FIT/GPX/ZWO/MRC/ERG/TCX uploads + downloads), and a cross-domain aggregator (`get_activity_full_report`) that fetches 8 endpoints in parallel and returns one consolidated markdown report. Two profiles: `lean` (default — 45 tools, ~14.9k tokens of tool schema, sized for Claude Desktop) and `full` (136 tools, ~44k tokens, full SDK coverage; `get_activity_full_report` is full-only). Each write tool is gated by `permissions.ask` in Claude Code; wellness writes default `locked: true` to survive Oura/Garmin sync.

**Prerequisite**: this extension runs the Python server via `uv` (Astral's fast Python package manager). Install `uv` once, then this DXT bundle works without any further toolchain setup. macOS/Linux: `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh`. Windows: `powershell -c "irm https://astral.sh/uv/install.ps1 | iex"`. Python 3.12+ is required; `uv` will auto-resolve and provision it on first run.

api_key.title: intervals.icu API key
api_key.description: Generate at intervals.icu → Settings → Developer Settings.

athlete_id.title: intervals.icu Athlete ID
athlete_id.description: Your numeric athlete ID, e.g. i12345 — visible in your profile URL.

full_toolset.title: Full toolset (advanced)
full_toolset.description: OFF (default) = lean profile (~45 high-value tools, ~15k tokens of schema) — everyday cycling coaching PLUS gear-maintenance (create/replace gear, wear reminders) and FTP/zone updates are already included, no toggle needed. ON = full profile (all 135 tools, ~44k tokens) for rare advanced ops: initial component setup, bulk event creation, wellness backfill, and analytics deep-dives (histograms, power-curves, etc.). Changing this relaunches the extension server, so the fresh connection re-reads the tool list; if Claude Desktop doesn't refresh, restart Desktop once.

profile.title: Tool profile (legacy: 'lean' or 'full')
profile.description: Legacy free-text fallback, kept for back-compat. The 'Full toolset' checkbox above is the recommended control. Values: lean (default, ~45 tools) or full (all 135 tools). Anything other than the literal 'full' falls back to lean. If the checkbox is ON it wins over this field.
